/*GBO Cafeteria Menu*/

/April 27th-May 1st/

/
/

/*Monday:* Breaded Chicken Tenders, mashed potatoes with country gravy and corn/

/
/

/*Tuesday:* Grilled Beef and Bean Burrito with chips and salsa/

/
/

/*Wednesday:* Chef Salad with bread sticks/

/
/

/*Thursday:* Chicken Breast Sandwich with melted provolone served with house made chips/

/
/

/*Friday:* Spinach and Mushroom Quesadillas served with black bean salad/
